case_title: JESSE ANTHONY PONCE JR VS. EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PONCE JR, JESSE ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT EMPORIUM SFC GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SPA WHITE EXPRESS EXTREME WHITENING LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA XTREME WHITENING DBA EXTREMETEETH WHITENING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
